message:
fix(vdbe,core): ORDER BY NULLS FIRST/LAST support + 16 conformance tests

Fix #78: ORDER BY with explicit NULLS FIRST/LAST was ignored in both
the VDBE sorter path and the connection-level sort_rows_by_order_terms.
Encode NULLS ordering in SorterOpen P4 string using extended chars
('+' ASC nulls-first, '-' DESC nulls-last, '>' ASC nulls-last,
'<' DESC nulls-first) and handle in compare_sorter_rows. Connection
fallback path now resolves term.nulls into ResolvedOrderTerm tuple.

Added 16 conformance oracle test suites (~120+ queries): REPLACE,
BETWEEN, compound SELECT, EXISTS, CAST, DELETE/UPDATE complex,
ORDER BY expressions, INSERT...SELECT, DISTINCT, triggers, NULL
functions, multi-JOIN, expression SELECT, integer overflow, LIKE,
GROUP BY multi-column.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
